ops.title: The athome shared-infra repo — what it is, its plan, and migration targets

ops.body:
**experiment@home** — GitHub/PyPI `experiment-at-home`, import + CLI `athome`, at `~/Code/experiment-at-home` (public, PolyForm-NC). Shared local-AI primitives extracted from `~/Code/cc-steer`, `~/Code/stream-trade`, `~/Code/write-like-me`, which all migrate onto it at the end. Bootstrapped with repo-bootstrap (uv+uv_build, flat `athome/`, Click CLI, Great Docs, PyPI trusted publishing). Core deps: click/anyio/httpx/loguru/pydantic/pydantic-settings + aiosqlite. **Hard constraint:** core imports on Python 3.14 free-threaded with GIL disabled (CI asserts `sys._is_gil_enabled()` False); native-dep features go behind extras + sidecar subprocesses (`athome.workers`).

The binding plan is `/Users/yasyf/.cc-pool/accounts/acct-07/plans/across-this-project-stream-trade-lucky-music.md`. Phases: A core (config/cache/llmcache/workers+wire/progress/launchd/detach/sync/store/cli/ocr-types) → v0.1.0; B serve recipes (rapid-mlx + mlx-vlm two-lane) / llm lanes+batch / ocr engines (dots.ocr+Apple Vision quality profile) + athome-ocr-paddle sidecar / modal / hf / embed / bakeoff → v0.2.0; C research harness → v0.3.0; D stream-trade migration (first, most surface; llama.cpp→Rapid-MLX gated by athome.bakeoff fidelity run) → E cc-steer(+lab) → F write-like-me.

**Design decisions that bind implementation:** all settings via pydantic-settings (per-module `Settings` bound to a `[section]`, `ATHOME_` env prefix, `~/.athome/config.toml`, secrets = required env fields); redesign APIs fresh (donors supply semantics/invariants, not signatures — adapt donors at migration, no compat shims); async-only SDK, sync only at CLI via `athome.cli.coro`; cache = object core + `@cached` decorator; llm = explicit lane funcs (`small`/`extract`/`local`/`batch`); ocr = profiles over compositional core. The v0.1 public surface spec is `docs/design/core-api.md` in-repo.

**v0.6.0 LIVE ON PYPI (2026-07-17, commit 51309fd3)** — the Tinker lane rebuilt from scratch as a pipelined op-stream engine (`athome.train.engine`: TrainOp=fb+optim one value, submit-ahead `execute()`, `projection()` over the same schedule; 1 clock cycle/step vs ~3). New surface: `TinkerBackend.fit/materialize/fuse/score`, `CheckpointPolicy`/`EvalRow` (full-sequence weights)/`TrainReport`/`SavedCheckpoint`/`ScoredSequence(logprob, weight)`/`Adapter(step, adapter_dir, train_cost_usd)`/`Rows`; `athome.train.retrain()` (select/artifact_scorer/gate callables, NO side effects inside); `athome.train.gate` (cc-steer's stats ported: explicit higher-is-fire — orient with fire=1-p, threshold t→1-t — one `warranted` mask, exact integer budget matching fixing the donor's float-floor undercount); `gather_bounded` → `athome.concurrency` (concurrency kw required). `run_sft`/`run_dpo` GONE; under-filled pools raise `InsufficientData`. Deliberately kept: DPO Custom loss bills 2× train rate (conservative over-reserve; codex claimed leg 1 is prefill-priced — unverifiable client-side, rejected). tinker SDK uninstallable in the repo's 3.14t venv (orjson); real-SDK work uses a 3.13 scratch env (`UV_PROJECT_ENVIRONMENT=/tmp/... uv sync --frozen --python 3.13 --extra train`); a 2-step real fit+score smoke passed (fb-path vs sampling-path deltas ≤0.34 logprob). cc-steer v0.11.0 consumes this (watcher retrain = `athome.train.retrain` + sentinel EvalRows).

Progress (through 0.5.1): **v0.5.1 via trusted publishing** (releases 0.1.0→0.5.1; the publisher-registration blocker cleared 2026-07-14 — nothing is PyPI-blocked anymore). Phases A+B+C shipped as 0.1–0.3.x; 0.4.0 added **`athome.train`** — LoRA SFT+DPO, backends tinker>local-mlx>modal with spend hard-aborts, all converging on a fused 4-bit MLX artifact in the shared content-addressed `athome.registry`. **Load-bearing seam:** `train/__init__.py:evaluate()` writes `.athome-metric.json` — the exact channel `athome.research`'s loop reads, so `metric_command = "athome train run …"` (or any command writing via `athome.train.write_metric`) turns the research loop into a training-recipe search with zero new plumbing. `hf.py ensure_write_auth` OAuth KeyError fixed in ce344b5 (branches on `auth["type"]`); note `HfSettings.token` reads the `HF_TOKEN` env var only — it is NOT auto-populated from `~/.cache/huggingface/token`. spawnllm 0.6.1 on PyPI. Design + accepted-findings docs under `docs/design/`. Consumers: stream-trade is deep in (28 files); cc-steer and write-like-me migrations underway as of 2026-07-15/16.

**Phase C research harness** (`athome.research`) took TWO adversarial-refuter rounds beyond the first fix pass — the friendly passes undercounted. Final hardened state: immutability enforced by diffing the STAGED index vs incumbent BEFORE any commit object exists + scoring from a clean no-`.git` `git archive` checkout (closes the git-config RCE class where a candidate `git config core.fsmonitor`/`filter.*` in a shared worktree ran as operator); tight `mutable_paths` allowlist with symlink + Python-auto-loader rejection; judges bound to a concrete spawnllm backend (family derived, not declared) behind a single gated spend boundary (fail-closed cross-family, uncacheable controls, canonical vote-cache key, packet-hash golden gate); per-experiment flock + registry locks + validated cost/metric. **User picked Option A** (bounded fixes + clone isolation now; OS-sandbox containment deferred): three limits are DOCUMENTED-not-fixed in `docs/design/research-security-model.md` — metric authorship (candidate `metric_command` code can write a forged metric + `os._exit`), process-group escape (setsid), cost-forge via the shared run log — all needing a future sandboxed-execution increment. See [[codex-security-review-content-filter]].

**Active program (2026-07-16, approved plan `lets-see-what-we-synchronous-cookie.md`):** athome grows a fully-autonomous-under-caps autoresearch OUTER loop + hardening adopted from github.com/Danau5tin/ai-trains-ai. **CORRECTED 2026-07-17: A1–A4+A8 never shipped in 0.5.x** — the earlier "SHIPPED in 0.5.1" claim was wrong: v0.5.1 (f3afd44) contained ONLY the PipeWorker process-group fix, and the whole A-track lineage (356eec3 A1 → bacf8fb A3.11, 19 commits incl. the A3.2–A3.11 accounting-hardening gauntlet, the 9B BASE_MODELS entry, and mirror_cc_notes) sat on heads unreachable from main. It was **reconciled onto main 2026-07-17 in-session** (rebased across the 0.6.0 train rework + the hardened A6a; ~10 conflict resolutions + 9 test-seam repairs; suite green) and ships in **0.7.0** together with A5 retro, A6a policy/proposer (security-hardened: path confinement, finite budgets, seq identity, template NAME_RE, qwen judge family), A6b campaign runner + ledger + kill switch, and A7 watchdog. The gauntlet's one-rule invariant stands: every unit termination path records spend exactly once or leaves a durable abort latch; no assume-zero branch. **A3.12 (task 389b4ff) was never actually written** (the old "shipped as A3.12" note conflated task-filed with shipped) — it plus the 50d9590 harness-kill orphan registry (HARD pre-A6b-production blocker; fix folds into A7's watchdog) and a workers.py killpg-EPERM exception-masking flake form the accounting-finale lane before the 0.7.0 tag. cc-steer's P4/P6 backlog is re-scoped onto adopting this instead of building native machinery. **The operator actively drives this repo directly** — coordinate before agent writes.

Use `jj`/`ccx vcs ship` not raw git ([[jj-colocated-raw-git-push-noop]]); always verify origin via `gh api .../commits/main`.
